privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated CSV data injected by setup_task.sh. The data contains 15 real modeled participants (sub-01 through sub-15) and 1 intentionally contaminated participant (sub-99). The contaminated participant receives exactly 50% 1s and 50% 0s at all SOA values [-240, -120, -60, -30, 0, 30, 60, 120, 240], preventing accurate curve fitting. The verifier precisely checks the accuracy of PSS and JND fitting metrics for the 15 valid participants, ensuring sub-99 is excluded, and expects the output at /home/ga/pebl/analysis/toj_report.json.
